message:
fix(dolt): make gt dolt start idempotent and fix server detection

Two fixes:

1. findDoltServerOnPort now uses -sTCP:LISTEN filter on lsof. Without
   it, client connections (e.g., gt daemon) were returned first,
   failing the isDoltProcess check and causing false "not running".

2. Start() returns nil instead of error when server is already running
   and legitimate. gt dolt start is now idempotent — "ensure server
   is running" rather than "fail if already running".

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
